passive.name: Key Insight
passive.description: Harith gains insight from his Key. He gains 7% Hybrid Lifesteal for each nearby enemy hero, stacking up to 35%.

skill1.name: Synchro Fission
skill1.description:
Harith creates a phantom of himself in a distant location. Harith and his phantom then release Synchro Fission toward each other, dealing 150 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemy units on the path.
When the 2 energy waves collide, they explode, dealing 450 (+180% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies in the area.
This skill deals 60% extra damage to creeps (up to 1500 damage).
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=50/55/60/65/70/75
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=150/180/210/240/270/300
|stats3=Explosion Damage|stats3_value=450/540/630/720/810/900

skill2.name: Chrono Dash
skill2.description:
Harith dashes towards the target direction, gaining a 120 (+120% Total Magic Power) shield and enhancing his next Basic Attack. Harith's enhanced Basic Attack deals 200 (+100% Total Physical Attack) (+70% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slows enemies by 40%. Hitting an enemy with Harith's enhanced Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Chrono Dash by 3s. This shield can stack up to 3 times.
The enhanced Basic Attack only deals 50 (+100% Total Physical Attack) (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to Turrets.
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=50/53/56/59/62/65
|stats2=Shield|stats2_value=120/150/180/210/240/270
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=200/230/260/290/320/350
|stats4=Damage to Turrets|stats4_value=50/60/70/80/90/100

ultimate.name: Zaman Force
ultimate.description:
Harith uses his Key to summon the Zaman Force, creating a multidimensional rift. Upon appearance, it reduces the cooldown of Chrono Dash by 4s. The rift continuously slows enemy heroes in the area by 40%.
When Harith comes into contact with the rift using Chrono Dash, he absorbs its energy, reducing the cooldown of Synchro Fission by 1s and Chrono Dash by 3s. Harith gains 15% Resilience while on the rift.
|quote="They say geniuses recognize one another!" a quote from Harley.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=40.0/35.0/30.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=120/160/200
